sources.title: AI Infra Companies by Revenue Range

result.summary: Identified 14 AI infrastructure startups in the $10-50M ARR range across inference optimization, vector databases, and ML pipeline orchestration, with median revenue growth of 180% YoY and average last-round valuations of 45x ARR.
key_findings: Vector database companies (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant) show strongest growth trajectories with 200%+ YoY ARR expansion driven by RAG adoption
Inference optimization startups command highest multiples (50-60x ARR) due to direct GPU cost savings value proposition
ML pipeline orchestration targets are most acquisition-friendly with 3 of 5 identified companies having less than 18 months runway at current burn rates
